arts.ttl: Man Utd get Zirkzee sale boost as club go public on transfer desire: He’s very good!
arts.sum: One man who has been linked with a departure from Juventus in January is Douglas Luiz, who, like Zirkzee, has failed to make an impact following a summer move. Man Utd get Zirkzee sale boost as club go public on transfer desire: He’s very good!

arts.ttl: Michael Owen gives his prediction for Manchester City vs Manchester United
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to clash with local rivals Manchester United on Sunday and former Red Devils striker Michael Owen has made his prediction ahead of the game

arts.ttl: Man City legend claims Pep Guardiola's hopes of silverware hinge on TWO key players this season
arts.sum: Man City legend Richard Dunne believes that their fortunes rely on the performances of two superstars.

arts.ttl: Amorim’s promise of jam tomorrow at Manchester United is already spread thin | Jonathan WIlson
arts.sum: The banter era rolls on at Old Trafford and Sunday’s trip to City could be more clown-car rally than demolition derby There was a moment, at about 5.30pm last Saturday, when there seemed a genuine danger that Manchester United might be turning into a serious football club. But it took only two minutes and the sight of Nikola Milenkovic soaring above Lisandro Martínez for that facade to collapse. Two further weird goals later – the sort of accidents that speak of a profound carelessness – and it was clear that the banter era still has some time to run. That was only the beginning. By the following morning, Dan Ashworth had been mutual-consented out of the club: five months’ gardening leave followed by five months of actual work, a truly magnificent piece of living satire, even before you consider the compensation United had to pay Newcastle to secure him and the hefty payoff he must have received. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Manchester City 'plot STUNNING move for Paul Pogba' as Pep Guardiola searches for midfield reinforcements... but Premier League champions face one key stumbling block to secure the former United star's services
arts.sum: Manchester City have identified Paul Pogba as a potential midfield addition amidst the club's dismal run of form but could be prevented by the player having a key issue over a move to the Etihad.
